visible_context.label: nlspec_content
visible_context.content:
Slugify Smoke NLSpec v1
Why: produce predictable ASCII URL slugs from short content titles.
What: expose slugify(input: &str) -> String.
How: trim surrounding whitespace; lowercase ASCII letters; keep ASCII digits; treat ASCII whitespace and punctuation as separators; collapse repeated separators into one hyphen; strip leading and trailing hyphens; return "untitled" when no letters or digits remain after normalization.
Done: covers ASCII words, repeated whitespace, punctuation, leading/trailing separators, numeric tokens, already-slugged input, and empty input fallback.

visible_context.label: implementation_snippet
visible_context.content: pub fn slugify maps non ASCII characters to separators and falls back when the slug is empty
